hero.sub: I build performant, accessible, and visually precise interfaces. Currently owning front-end on a GRC SaaS platform serving GCC enterprises — shipping real-time data, Arabic RTL, and complex RBAC at scale.

about.label: 01 — About
about.body1: I engineer the front-end, own the product UX, and push code that scales. Currently at a GRC SaaS company where I lead client-facing interfaces for GCC enterprises — risk dashboards, maturity assessments, Arabic RTL, real-time WebSocket data.
about.body2: Before that: Accenture (deep legacy refactor on internal QA tooling), freelance CRM, hotel management systems. I've seen the full stack — from PostgreSQL query tuning to CSS keyframe animation — and I write code the same way whether anyone's watching or not.

projects.label: 02 — Selected Work
projects.instruction: Scroll to navigate — drag to explore

gallurio.name: Gallurio
gallurio.tagline: A CRM built for how local teams actually sell.
gallurio.description: Gallurio is a CRM SaaS platform launching in the Philippines — built from the ground up for local sales teams. Lead capture, pipeline management, follow-ups, and team collaboration, without the enterprise bloat. My first full product, currently in active development.

chronoTask.description: Nuxt-powered task app with calendar views, drag-and-drop scheduling, and a clean dashboard. Built to stay out of your way while keeping every deadline visible.

plato.tagline: Recipe planning with a real backend.
plato.description: Full-stack recipe planner with .NET 9 API, MS SQL database, OAuth authentication, user favorites, and a paginated explore feed. Full auth-to-data ownership cycle.

trackr.description: Standalone Angular 19 app using Signals and ng2-charts for live expense categorization, animated graphs, and responsive mobile layout.

eliteMotors.tagline: A car dealership site that sells.
eliteMotors.description: Marketing site for a luxury car dealership. Animated hero, inventory grid with filtering, lead-capture contact flow, and optimized Core Web Vitals.

estateLiving.description: Real-estate portal with image gallery carousels, featured property blocks, and a clean inquiry flow — built to convert visitors into leads.

userTracker.tagline: Audit log with RBAC — built in 3 days.
userTracker.description: Full-stack user audit tracker built as an interview project. React frontend with Node.js + MySQL backend, role-based access control, and filterable activity logs.

financeTracker.description: Personal finance app with categorized transaction entry, trend visualization, and monthly summary breakdowns. Clean, fast, mobile-ready.

hotelHMS.description: End-to-end HMS for a live hotel client. Reservations, room availability calendars, staff scheduling, and reporting dashboards — Prisma + Next.js, built solo.

rezilens.title: Front End Developer
rezilens.summary: Own the front-end of a GRC SaaS/PaaS platform serving GCC enterprises — data-rich risk, compliance, and maturity dashboards that translate ECC, CIS, and CMMI frameworks into intuitive workflows. Led the Arabic localization (RTL + i18n), shipped WebSocket real-time data feeds, and enforced granular role-based access control. End-to-end: client requirements to scoped user stories, code reviews, CI/CD, and Agile delivery.

accenture.title: Front End Developer
accenture.summary: Took ownership of a mission-critical internal QA ticketing system used org-wide. Led a deep refactor of years of accumulated legacy code into a clean, modular component architecture. Designed and shipped an integrated ticket-history feature that sharpened the accuracy and reliability of the entire QA process.

freelance.title: Full Stack Developer
freelance.summary: Sole developer of an internal CRM that became a UAE sales company's operational backbone. Built it ground-up — React frontend, Node.js REST APIs — and owned the full delivery lifecycle from requirements gathering through production deployment.

accesssoft.title: Full Stack Developer
accesssoft.summary: Led development of an enterprise Hotel Management System for a live hotel client in Mindanao. Built end-to-end with Next.js, Angular, and .NET (C#) — responsive staff interfaces, connected APIs, and a database designed for real operational load.

sykes.title: Software Developer Intern
sykes.summary: Built and enhanced React components, integrated REST APIs, and turned design mockups into responsive layouts with CSS, Tailwind, and SASS — supporting senior developers on live production features.
